content:
📜 1. XP System Overhaul – Earning, Spending, & Unlocking Evolution

📜 XP is now earned ONLY through active engagement (Skill Checks, Challenges, Risky Plays).

✔ XP is NOT earned passively. Completing basic assignments keeps you in the game, but does not advance your character or unlock anything extra.
✔ Skill Checks are the only way to gain XP. To attempt an unlockable item, reroll, or character evolution, students must complete at least one weekly Skill Check.

📜 XP Earning Breakdown
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 192 (chunk 192/555)
